title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: CLATSOP COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors. Processes bail and commissary transactions. 1190 SE 19th Street Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 325-8635 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-8635 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - ETHICSPOINT LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - SHERIFF'S OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
